meta.title: Roman Catholic Mass Debate: Is the Mass a Propitiatory Sacrifice?
meta.author: 125 Church (Apologetic Dog)

questions.question: What is the formal resolution debated in this event?
options: Whether justification is by faith alone apart from works
Whether the papacy is supported by Matthew 16
Whether icons should be venerated in Christian worship
Whether the Mass is a propitiatory sacrifice
questions.answer: Whether the Mass is a propitiatory sacrifice

questions.question: Which church hosted the live debate?
Who moderated the debate?
Joe Heschmeyer’s opening appealed to Luther and Calvin primarily to show what?
options: That the Reformers invented transubstantiation at Wittenberg
That Calvin denied any real presence in the Supper
That Luther taught indulgences for the dead
That pre-Reformation Christian consensus widely treated the Mass as sacrificial and propitiatory
questions.answer: That pre-Reformation Christian consensus widely treated the Mass as sacrificial and propitiatory

questions.question: Which Old Testament chapter did Heschmeyer use to argue that Gentiles would include some called priests who offer sacrifice?
In the debate, Malachi 1 is especially connected to which New Testament theme?
options: The Lord’s table / Eucharist understood as offering
Jesus’ cleansing of the temple in John 2 only
The seven churches in Revelation 2–3 only
questions.answer: The Lord’s table / Eucharist understood as offering

questions.question: Which Pauline passage did Heschmeyer emphasize for participation in Christ’s body and blood and parallels to altar-meals?
James White’s negative case centers exegetically on which New Testament book?
White argues Hebrews 10 teaches that repeated sacrifices under the old system primarily functioned as what?
options: A complete removal of original sin after one offering
A yearly reminder of sins because they did not perfect the worshipers
Proof that grain offerings alone atone without blood
A command to continue daily temple sacrifices after Pentecost
questions.answer: A yearly reminder of sins because they did not perfect the worshipers

questions.question: According to White’s opening argument, what does Hebrews 10:14 emphasize about Christ’s offering?
options: That many offerings together perfect the church over centuries
That by one offering Christ has perfected for all time those being sanctified
That perfection is impossible until purgatory is completed
That the offering is incomplete until each Mass is heard
questions.answer: That by one offering Christ has perfected for all time those being sanctified

questions.question: White read magisterial language describing priests as acting how in the Eucharistic sacrifice?
options: Sola gratia without any ministerial mediation
As Levitical descendants of Aaron by DNA testing
In persona Christi (another Christ / alter Christus)
questions.answer: In persona Christi (another Christ / alter Christus)

questions.question: White contrasts Roman Catholic uncertainty about the state of grace (citing Ludwig Ott) with which Pauline assurance text?
Which early document does Heschmeyer cite for Eucharistic assembly language including sacrifice/offering purity?
In cross-examination, Heschmeyer presses White on Hebrews 9 by comparing Christ’s non-repeated heavenly entrance to which Jewish ritual pattern?
options: Passover only with no priestly mediation
Yom Kippur (Day of Atonement) high-priestly presentation
questions.answer: Yom Kippur (Day of Atonement) high-priestly presentation

questions.question: Heschmeyer appeals to Keith Mathison’s argument that every appeal to Scripture is also an appeal to what?
Which patristic preacher does Heschmeyer quote in closing as calling the Eucharist a sacrifice of propitiation for the living and the dead (c. 348–350)?
Which Anglican liturgical scholar does Heschmeyer cite on early Eucharistic sacrifice and the high-priestly heavenly pattern?
White brings up John O’Brien’s popular Catholic book titled what?
Heschmeyer cites which Eastern Orthodox theologian’s dogmatics for a blunt statement that the Eucharist is propitiatory?
White highlights Hebrews 7:25 as tying Christ’s ability to save forever to what ongoing work?
options: Intercession for those who draw near to God through him
questions.answer: Intercession for those who draw near to God through him

questions.question: In the debate, how many prior public debates does the moderator attribute to James White?
White argues that transubstantiation’s technical defense becomes especially tied to which medieval theologian’s Aristotelian analysis (per his telling)?
Heschmeyer’s Passover-style argument distinguishes killing the lamb from what further aspect of the rite?
options: Eating/partaking of the sacrificed victim as applying the sacrifice
Burning the entire lamb outside the camp only
questions.answer: Eating/partaking of the sacrificed victim as applying the sacrifice

questions.question: In Q&A, White describes indulgences as connected to which concept?
options: Sola scriptura proof texts only in the Deuterocanon
The treasury of merit (including excess merits of Christ, Mary, and saints)
questions.answer: The treasury of merit (including excess merits of Christ, Mary, and saints)

questions.question: When asked about Trent’s language of the victim being “daily immolated,” Heschmeyer explains it as referring to what?
options: A new crucifixion of Christ each morning
Sacrificial offering in an unbloody manner, not a re-shedding of Christ’s blood
A purely symbolic community meal with no covenantal weight
questions.answer: Sacrificial offering in an unbloody manner, not a re-shedding of Christ’s blood

questions.question: White’s favorite book of the Bible (as stated in Q&A) is which?
